appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/environment.md to match the AUTH_TOKEN default currently written by .factory/init.sh.
Updated .factory/library/user-testing.md to tell validators to read AUTH_TOKEN from .env instead of using the stale hardcoded token example.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update backend-worker and cli-worker skill examples to reference AUTH_TOKEN from the repo .env (or the current init.sh default) instead of the stale hardcoded token `involute-dev-token-001`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for foundation-scrutiny-fixes found `.factory/init.sh` now writes `AUTH_TOKEN=changeme-set-your-token`, while `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md` and `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md` still hardcode `involute-dev-token-001` in manual verification examples.
